_comment: Copy this file to sonar.config.json to override defaults. All keys are optional.
_autoUpdateCheck_comment: Check GitHub for a newer version at startup (non-blocking, logs to stderr). Default: true.
_autoUpdate_comment: Auto-apply updates at startup. Requires SONAR_ALLOW_UPDATE=1 in the MCP server env (set via npm run setup). Default: false.

search._comment: engines run in parallel, results merged + deduped. brave/tavily/serpapi require keys in sonar.secrets.json. searxng requires searxngUrl.
